Policy settings do not apply
Google Antigravity
bug
leon_h
March 25, 2026,  6:37pm
1
In AntiGravity user settings i have enabled everywhere, where its possible that the model auto proceeds. My deny list is also empty. My problem is, it still asks for input on my side.
MrCurlyMole
March 25, 2026,  6:40pm
2
check the link below. It also covers browser and tmp permissions. It works even when there are version updates. Fully open sourced at github and listed on Open VSX.
Supersmooth: open-source extension that fixes terminal auto-proceed, auto-scroll, and other AG friction
Google Antigravity
For anyone running into the
“Always Proceed” terminal bug
and other workflow friction in Antigravity, I built an open-source extension to fix it: Supersmooth.
What it does




Problem
Supersmooth fix




“Always Proceed” doesn’t auto-execute terminal commands
Removes the confirmation popup when your saved policy is already “Always run”


“Steps Require Input” sections stay collapsed
Auto-expands approval prompts so nothing is hidden


Permission dialogs (Allow, Accept, Run) block the agent
Auto…
if it helps you, don’t forget to rate the extension.
